items.title: API Authentication & Authorization
items.description: OAuth 2.0 flows, JWT structure and validation, API keys, mTLS, OIDC, token introspection, and Spring Security integration.

items.title: API Security
items.description: Security patterns specific to REST and GraphQL APIs — API keys, rate limiting, input validation, schema validation, mass assignment, sensitive data exposure, API versioning security, and API gateway hardening.
